name: artisana-root
description: Root package.json to manage the Artisana ecosystem

scripts.build: npm install --prefix ArtisanaWebsite/skillhub-africa/frontend && npm run build --prefix ArtisanaWebsite/skillhub-africa/frontend && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); try { fs.rmSync('public', {recursive:true, force:true}); fs.cpSync('ArtisanaWebsite/skillhub-africa/frontend/.next/standalone', 'public', {recursive:true}); fs.cpSync('ArtisanaWebsite/skillhub-africa/frontend/.next/static', 'public/.next/static', {recursive:true}); fs.cpSync('ArtisanaWebsite/skillhub-africa/frontend/public', 'public/public', {recursive:true}); console.log('Successfully prepared public directory for Hostinger Node.js deployment!'); } catch(e) { console.error('Packaging failed:', e.message); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix ArtisanaWebsite/skillhub-africa/frontend && cd ArtisanaWebsite/skillhub-africa/backend && pip install -r requirements.txt
